title: euphorbia esula subsp. orientalis
intro: Euphorbia esula subsp. orientalis, also known as leafy spurge, is a subspecies of the Euphorbia esula plant, a type of succulent native to Asia and Eastern Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Euphorbia esula subsp. orientalis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
